channel.title: Pages on this is rob dyke dot com
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on this is rob dyke dot com

item.title: About
item.description: I’m a long time open source hacker. A decade of my career was in NHSland where I co-founded open eObs and made NHoS / NHSbuntu - an OS for the NHS. These days I research the security and privacy of apps listed in the NHS Apps Library. I registered robdyke.com on the 19th August 2000. Amalgated here Here are the all the posts I’ve written since I started blogging in 2004:
